response:
### Basic Salad Ingredients (Checkbox Format)
---
#### Core Leafy Base (Required for salad structure)
- [ ] Chopped romaine lettuce (most versatile basic base)
- [ ] Shredded iceberg lettuce (budget-friendly, crisp basic)
- [ ] Torn green leaf lettuce (mild, soft basic base)

#### Essential Basic Toppings (Standard for a "basic tossed salad")
- [ ] Sliced cucumber (seeded or unseeded)
- [ ] Halved cherry tomatoes / chopped roma tomatoes
- [ ] Thinly sliced red onion (mild, non-overpowering)
- [ ] Shredded carrots

#### Basic Dressing (Choose 1 type; mandatory for a complete salad)
##### Homemade Basic Vinaigrette (Simplest homemade option)
- [ ] Extra-virgin olive oil
- [ ] Red wine vinegar (or white distilled vinegar)
- [ ] Table salt
- [ ] Ground black pepper
##### Store-Bought Basic Dressing (Shortcut option)
- [ ] Plain ranch dressing (most popular creamy basic)
- [ ] Regular Italian dressing (most popular vinaigrette basic)

#### Optional Basic Add-Ins (Common but non-essential for "basic")
- [ ] Plain croutons (garlic/cheese-flavored is fine)
- [ ] Shredded mild cheddar cheese
- [ ] Sliced hard-boiled egg
- [ ] Diced plain cooked chicken breast
